title: Geotag Images

# Geotag Images

- Code: 237a7de6
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=237a7de6502a4c8186f3763217323c47
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/9641e577cd1248e9bf4b18939bd8c94e?sid=9cad0c41-190b-4cf8-94c9-025a6359d0b4?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true

_(no description)_

transcript.text: This is the tool we use to geo take images. I have the URL modules geo Imgur
It's $10 a month if you want or need a license
If it if you don't have a license you can do one at a time with the license you can do I can't remember exactly
How many 25 I think at a time so you're basically just upload your images and then you put which location you want to
Geo tag it you hit Geo tag. It's super quick. I've heard from a lot of SEOs that this doesn't do anything
Maybe it does maybe it doesn't generally we don't split test things that we can get done in like less than a half hour
It's not even worth split testing it. I have had clients where we
Geo tagged some images uploaded them and they started ranking
Significantly better overnight. I know that images can help them rank better
So maybe it was the images. Maybe it was the geo tagging may was a combination
But regardless things that take very little time. We usually will just do them
And I know that if you upload these photos to your Google business profile and then redownload them all of the
So some people have used that as an example that hey
That's why it doesn't matter because Google scrubs the data when it's uploaded
But we don't know what happens when you're uploading them. Yeah, Google is scrubbing them
But is Google taking account of the geo tagging and then scrubbing them
So I've seen positive rank results from this. We just do it
You know 60 70 images can be done in less than a half hour. There's no reason not to do this

It's super quick.
